flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Lutheran University rose 38% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.1k → $11.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas Lutheran University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (35.0% → 29.7%).
